title: Evolution: Wild Shift
hook: Steer a visible brood through hostile biomes, then draft mutations so the next generation survives heat, cold, toxins, predators, and floods.
mechanic: Real-time creature survival and mutation drafting. The player drags a pheromone target to move a brood through food, safe habitat pockets, hazards, and predators; each survived generation grants one of three trait mutations that counters future environmental pressures.

dedupe.notes: User explicitly requested Games/240_evolution_cool from the Treasure Vault Evolution idea. No Gallery or other game folders were modified.
